app.name: BharatLM
app.description: AI-powered tools for 13+ Indian languages — chat, translate, convert scripts, and more.

converter.title: Script Converter
converter.description: Convert text between Devanagari, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and other Indic scripts.

transliteration.title: Transliteration Engine
transliteration.description: Type in English and auto-convert to any Indic script.

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.description: Speech-to-text and text-to-speech for all 13 Indian languages.

translation.title: Document Translation Workbench
translation.description: Translate government, legal, and official documents across Indian languages.

benchmark.title: Indic NLP Evaluation Benchmarks
benchmark.description: Performance metrics across tasks and languages for BharatLM models.

advisory.title: Agricultural Advisory Chatbot
advisory.description: Weather updates, crop advice, and market prices in your language.

education.title: Education Tutor
education.description: Learn subjects in your regional language with AI-powered tutoring.
education.subject: Subject

healthcare.title: Healthcare Information Assistant
healthcare.description: Reliable health information in your local language.
healthcare.disclaimer: This is for informational purposes only. Consult a doctor for medical advice.

api.title: API & Usage Dashboard
api.description: Monitor API usage, per-language routing, and performance metrics.
